mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement where your riches are guaranteed and your demands are our commands!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I stroll into a five-star restaurant, expect to be seated immediately. But, there's a waitlist! Can you believe it? I throw a fit, demand to see the manager, and declare that as the CEO of Bank of Entitlement, I should never have to wait for anything. Next thing you know, the entire restaurant is rearranging tables to accommodate me, the VIP of VIPs. And that, my friends, is how you assert dominance with entitlement!
